pi_items.source: setup_nuxeo.sh line 150-156 creates Workspace named 'Projects' at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects using Nuxeo REST API
setup_nuxeo.sh line 217-220 creates File document named 'Annual-Report-2023' in Projects workspace from annual_report_2023.pdf (9.6KB real PDF)
setup_nuxeo.sh line 222-225 creates File document named 'Project-Proposal' in Projects workspace from project_proposal.pdf (9.3KB real PDF)

task.json description requires title 'Project Readme'; setup_task.sh line 45 checks for multiple name variations (Project-Readme, Project_Readme, etc.); export_result.sh line 39 searches by dc:title='Project Readme'; verifier.py line 59 checks if 'Project Readme' in title
verifier.py line 54: score += 20 for note_exists check
verifier.py line 60: score += 10 for title containing 'Project Readme'
verifier.py line 78: score += 35 when Annual Report UID found in note content
verifier.py line 87: score += 35 when Project Proposal UID found in note content

privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_project_readme@1' is a Nuxeo Platform 10.10 document creation task requiring creation of a Note document in the Projects workspace (at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects) with title 'Project Readme' containing internal hyperlinks to two existing File documents: 'Annual-Report-2023' and 'Project-Proposal'. All workspace paths, document names, and expected titles are verified against setup_nuxeo.sh and task scripts. The scoring system awards 20 points for note existence, 10 for correct title, and 35 points each for valid internal links to each target document (100 points maximum). The data is non-synthetic: real PDF files (annual_report_2023.pdf at 9.6KB and project_proposal.pdf at 9.3KB) are uploaded as File documents during environment setup.
